name: Full Lifecycle Engineer Pack
description: A composed pack for agents that need to take work from discovery through implementation, review, release, and follow-up.

codex.notes: Composed packs, skills, GitHub inspection metadata, and portable managed lifecycle prompts/templates/tools validate for Codex and local coding-agent workflows.

claude-code.notes: Composed Agent Skills, Claude-compatible plugin metadata, and portable managed lifecycle capabilities are supported for Claude Code users.

useCases: Take a feature from product discovery through implementation, review, launch, and follow-up.
Coordinate multi-step coding-agent work where requirements, quality gates, release risk, and ownership all matter.
Prepare a scoped delivery plan that connects product intent to implementation tasks, PR review, and rollout checks.
Help local agents keep context across discovery notes, code changes, reliability checks, and shipping decisions.
examplePrompts: Turn this feature idea into a lifecycle plan covering discovery questions, implementation steps, tests, review, launch, and follow-up.
Review this in-flight project and identify gaps across requirements, code quality, reliability, release readiness, and ownership.
Create a coding-agent work plan that moves from product context to PR-ready implementation without losing launch risks.
Summarize what must be true before this feature ships, including evidence, owners, rollback, and post-launch checks.

capabilities.name: Full lifecycle engineer pack guidance
capabilities.content: Use the Full Lifecycle Engineer Pack when a local coding agent needs to preserve product intent across discovery, implementation, review, launch, and follow-up. Keep the work anchored to user outcome, scope, risks, tests, rollout evidence, owners, and post-launch learning.

capabilities.name: Feature lifecycle plan
capabilities.content: Turn this feature request into a full lifecycle engineering plan. Cover discovery questions, requirements, non-goals, implementation slices, tests, PR review gates, launch readiness, rollback, observability, documentation, and post-launch follow-up. End with owner/date actions.

capabilities.name: Lifecycle delivery plan
capabilities.content:

capabilities.name: Lifecycle readiness scorecard
capabilities.content: {"name":"lifecycle-readiness-scorecard","description":"Portable non-executing descriptor for checking feature readiness across discovery, implementation, review, launch, and learning.","dimensions":["user_outcome","requirements","implementation_plan","tests","review_gates","launch_readiness","rollback","post_launch_learning"],"nonExecuting":true}
